query:
CREATE TABLE `posts` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `posts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `posts_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 42Pc6jKMuc4QDEs.root --database 9XreFiRYbvRJcb5U6GpiLR --execute CREATE TABLE `posts` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `posts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `posts_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);
